skills.name: prepare-benchmark-context
skills.description: Prepare local batch-eval context before editing a miner artifact.
skills.when_to_use: Before changing agent.py based on a local-eval report.

skills.name: improve-artifact
skills.description: Change a miner artifact using hypotheses from local-eval reports.
skills.when_to_use: When a focused code change should address known local-eval failures.

skills.name: run-local-eval
skills.description: Run miner local batch evaluation and extract the next iteration signal.
skills.when_to_use: After changing agent.py or before deciding whether to submit.

skills.name: connect-platform-mcp
skills.description: Connect to the public platform monitoring MCP and verify workflow tools are available.
skills.when_to_use: Before using MCP tools for champion context, submission verification, batch monitoring, or score diagnosis.

skills.name: start-from-champion
skills.description: Seed a miner iteration from current champion context exposed through public MCP.
skills.when_to_use: When starting from scratch or comparing a local candidate against current champion behavior.

skills.name: configure-before-submit
skills.description: Check and update miner config before submitting a script.
skills.when_to_use: Before uploading an artifact that needs provider credentials or intentional retry behavior.

skills.name: submit-and-confirm
skills.description: Submit a miner artifact and confirm platform acceptance.
skills.when_to_use: After local evaluation justifies uploading agent.py.

skills.name: monitor-batch
skills.description: Monitor waiting, running, and completed miner-task batches without overreading public visibility.
skills.when_to_use: After submission, while waiting for cutoff eligibility, running progress, or completed batch visibility.

skills.name: inspect-completed-results
skills.description: Inspect completed batch comparison and artifact-scoped result rows.
skills.when_to_use: After a source batch is completed and artifact/result rows are public.

skills.name: diagnose-score
skills.description: Diagnose weak, missing, failed, or surprising miner scores from public MCP evidence.
skills.when_to_use: When a submitted artifact has a confusing score, missing result, timeout, crash, or weak answer.

skills.name: preserve-debug-evidence
skills.description: Record the identifiers and observations needed before changing workflow direction.
skills.when_to_use: Before switching hypotheses, changing config, or starting a new iteration after platform diagnosis.
